name: HORAI Co., Ltd.
summary: HORAI Co., Ltd. engages in the insurance, real estate, dairy, restaurants and sightseeing facilities, and golf businesses in Japan. It is involved in the non-life insurance agency and life insurance offering businesses; leasing and managing buildings and real estate properties; manufacturing and selling milk and dairy products; breeding, milking, and feed production of dairy cattle; managing restaurants and sightseeing facilities; and operating Horai Country Club and Nishinasuno Country Club. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
